questionHtml:
A variable force with a maximum Fmax is applied to an object over a time interval T. The object has a mass m and is initially at rest.

What is the speed of the object at time T?


A.  FmaxT2m

B.  FmaxTm

C.  FmaxTm

D.  2FmaxTm

meta.title: A variable force with a maximum Fmax is applied to an object over a time interval T. The object has a mass m and is initially at rest. What is the speed of the object at time T? A.
